 {"id":"brenner_bot-5so.8.2","title":"Quality: golden sessions + regression harness","description":"# Goal
Create a small set of golden session artifacts and a harness that ensures:
- schemas remain compatible
- compiler outputs are stable
- linter rules don’t regress
","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-29T18:29:31.462550632-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T18:29:31.462550632-05:00","labels":["fixtures","quality"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-5so.8.2","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.8","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-29T18:29:31.463430839-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

 {"id":"brenner_bot-5so.8.3","title":"Docs: operator playbook + runbooks","description":"# Goal

 {"id":"brenner_bot-5so.8.3.1","title":"Runbook: local lab setup (Agent Mail + env)","description":"Document how to:
